title: Optimization Level
body:
Hello, 
I have a short question which i am not sure about. With the version 4 I compiled System Verilog to C++. When i change the Flag from -Os to -O3, it changed some System Verilog functions from an always comb block to an always sequent block (in C++ comb or sequent function). Because they only triggerd the outputs, this doesn't change the semantic of the code. With Version 5 this doesn't happen. My question is, does the Optimization Flag also affect the Code Generation or is it only later an option for the gcc (or clang) compiler ?
